QSC Core Health Analysis Report

Core: eternia-Core24-d447 | Period: 2026-06-02 20:42 IST to 2026-06-03 20:42 IST | Sources: Prometheus, Loki

1. CORE IDENTITY

  • Core Name: eternia-Core24-d447
  • Duration: 24 hours
  • Active Processes: audio_engine, runtime_engine, video_engine, node, engine_discover
  • Data Quality: 100% metric coverage

2. SYSTEM RESOURCE SUMMARY

  • Peak CPU: 38% (audio_engine)
  • Peak Memory: 4.72% (node)
  • Total Memory: ~1.33 GB
  • Processes: 10 PIDs (6 long-running, 4 restarted)

3. CPU STATE BREAKDOWN

  • audio_engine PID 6077: 32.23% user, 5.16% system — 23h
  • audio_engine PID 4652: 33.11% user — 30min spike
  • audio_engine PID 2066: 30.18% user, peak 35.5% at 20:35 IST
  • node PID 9000: 5.45% user — stable 24h
  • runtime_engine PID 6688: 3.71% user — consistent
  • video_engine, engine_discover: <0.2% combined

4. MEMORY STATE BREAKDOWN

  • node PID 9000: 739.7 MB — 54% of total, 3.5% growth
  • runtime_engine PID 6688: 409.7 MB — stable
  • audio_engine PID 6077: 239 MB — flat, zero variance
  • video_engine PID 9879: 44% DROP at 20:45 IST (75 MB to 42 MB) — ALERT
  • engine_discover PID 10596: 149.4 MB — 7.5% growth

6. MEMORY LEAK DETECTION

  • engine_discover PID 10596: WARNING — 7.5% growth (139 MB to 149.4 MB). Strongest leak candidate.
  • node PID 9000: MINOR — 3.5% growth (716 to 756 MB). Acceptable.
  • runtime_engine PID 5270: MINOR — 0.36% over 30 min. Monitor.
  • audio_engine PID 6077: HEALTHY — Zero variance.
  • runtime_engine PID 6688: HEALTHY — 0.5% increase. No leak.

7. CRASH AND STACKTRACE ANALYSIS

Fatal Errors: 0 crashes in 24h period

  • No fatal stacktrace logs in Loki
  • Zero error patterns identified
  • 4 coordinated restart events (no crash-driven)

8. METRICS AND LOG CORRELATION

  • Coordinated Restarts: audio_engine + runtime_engine restart simultaneously at 14:10, 14:40, 14:55 UTC — planned cycling.
  • video_engine Drop (20:45 IST): No fatal log — controlled release.
  • No Error-Metric Correlation: All restarts confirmed controlled.

9. UPTIME AND RESTART ANALYSIS

Long-Running (No Restarts): node 24h, video_engine 24h, engine_discover 24h, audio_engine PID 6077 23h, runtime_engine PID 6688 23h

Restart Events:

  • 14:10 UTC: audio_engine (4652) + runtime_engine (5270)
  • 14:40 UTC: audio_engine (25355) + runtime_engine (25947)
  • 14:55 UTC: audio_engine (2066) + runtime_engine (2687)

Synchronized restarts every 15-30 min — coordinated process cycling strategy.

10. ANOMALIES

  • video_engine Memory Drop: 44% at 20:45 IST. No crash signature.
  • Thread Decline: video_engine 63 to 56 threads over 24h.
  • engine_discover Creep: 7.5% sustained growth.
  • Restart Burst: 3 pairs in 45 min — unusual but controlled.

11. SUMMARY AND RISK ASSESSMENT

Overall Status: WARNING

HEALTHY: No crashes, CPU below 40%, memory below 5% per process, 5/6 processes with 23-24h uptime

WARNING: engine_discover 7.5% memory growth | 4 restarts in 1 hour | video_engine 44% memory drop

Risk: engine_discover leak potential | Restart frequency elevated | video_engine unpredictable

Positive: Zero crashes | Stable core processes | Predictable load | Controlled restarts

12. RECOMMENDED ACTIONS

Immediate:

  • Monitor engine_discover — alert at 175 MB threshold
  • Investigate video_engine drop at 20:45 IST
  • Review restart policy — consider extending 15-min interval

Short-Term:

  • Add engine_discover to proactive restart rotation
  • Baseline video_engine normal memory range
  • Set 5%/day memory growth alerts

Long-Term:

  • Audit coordinated restart strategy
  • Profile engine_discover for memory leak root cause
  • Capacity planning — current utilization low
